files.name: stylesheet
files.source:
<style>
  body { 
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-align: center; background-color:
    #f4f4f9; padding: 50px;
  }
  
  .card { 
    width: 20%;
    background: white; 
    padding: 20px; 
    border-radius: 10px; 
    box-shadow: 0
    4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); 
    display: inline-block; 
  }
  
  input { 
    width: 60%;
    padding: 10px; 
    border: 1px solid #ccc; 
    border-radius: 5px; 
    display: block;
    margin: 10px auto;
  }
  
  button { 
    padding: 10px 20px; 
    background-color: #28a745; 
    color: white;
    border: none; 
    border-radius: 5px; 
    cursor: pointer; }
  
  button:hover { 
    background-color: #357ae8; 
  }
  
  #resposta, #respostaNumeros { 
    margin-top: 20px; 
    font-weight: bold; 
    color: #2e7d32; 
  }
</style>
